premise: A junior office clerk discovers the company's basement is a dungeon that promotes employees through combat reviews.
injected_beats: The cursed stapler must appear before the first SYSTEM alert.
The copier demands tribute and prints a forbidden map.
The hero earns an absurdly specific office-themed skill.

extra_injected_beats: Open on a failed stealth roll near the time clock.

locked_part_scripts.cold-open: <NARRATOR>Optional explicit lock. This wins over reuse_ready_parts_from for the same part.</NARRATOR>
